# MeshGuard Docs

> Official documentation for MeshGuard, the governance control plane for AI agents.

This site contains the technical reference for integrating, deploying, and operating MeshGuard. It is the primary source for developers and operators implementing agent identity, policy, audit, and analytics with MeshGuard.

## About
MeshGuard is the governance layer for enterprise AI agent ecosystems. These docs cover:
- The Python, JavaScript, and .NET SDKs
- Framework integrations (LangChain, CrewAI, AutoGPT, OpenClaw, Clawdbot, Claude Code, OpenAI Agents, Semantic Kernel, Bedrock, Vertex AI)
- The HTTP gateway and admin APIs
- Self-hosted and enterprise deployment guides
- Policy authoring, audit log querying, and analytics

## Sections
- Guide: /guide/getting-started — install, quickstart, core concepts, deployment
- Integrations: /integrations/overview — SDKs and framework adapters
- API: /api/overview — gateway, admin, analytics, billing endpoints

## Related sites
- Marketing & sign-up: https://meshguard.app
- Conceptual guides and comparisons: https://learn.meshguard.app
- Dashboard: https://dashboard.meshguard.app
- Status: https://status.meshguard.app
